creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 219454
fix ports not using USES= eigen syntax

Hello,

eigen must be used with USES= eigen:3 (ok, this is not documented in porter's handbook).

Ports fixed:

- cad/PrusaSlicer
- graphics/opencv
- math/scilab
- math/libsemigroups
- math/py-python-fcl
- biology/gcta
